ModDescription: Summons, guaranteed and maxed: every quest/source that can drop a summon always drops one (the vanilla 35/50/70% chances become 100%), and the skills rolled on dropped summons always come out at the highest level their pool allows (vanilla rolls e.g. Lv11-15 with Lv15 rarest - this pins the top level). Both knobs are toggleable in Configure Mod. Restart the game after changing a setting - tables are generated from vanilla data at every launch; nothing on disk is modified. Built for Endless Ragnarok 2.0. Which summon drops and which skills appear in its pools stay vanilla.
